---
name: Pull Request
about: Submit code or documentation changes
title: ""
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## Description

What does this PR do? [One clear sentence]

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] 📖 Documentation
- [ ] 🏗️ Architecture / Refactor
- [ ] 🧪 Test
- [ ] 🔒 Security
- [ ] 📦 ERDL Skeleton
- [ ] 🛠️ Skill

## Checklist

### Code Quality
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run format:check` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes (all suites)
- [ ] No new `any` types or `@ts-ignore` comments
- [ ] Types are explicit (no unnecessary type assertions)

### Testing
- [ ] New features include unit tests
- [ ] Bug fixes include regression tests
- [ ] E2E tests added if UI changed

### Documentation
- [ ] API changes include Swagger annotations
- [ ] Architecture changes update relevant docs
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if applicable)

### Legal
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [CLA](../CLA.md)
- [ ] My contribution is original and does not infringe third-party rights
- [ ] I confirm employer authorization (if employed)

## Related Issues

Closes #[issue number]

## Screenshots / Demos

If UI or behavior changed, attach screenshots or recording here.

---

> **One human, one machine. One legion.**
>
> This project was built by 1 human + 1 AI executor. Your PR continues the co-creation.
